# html2md/scripts — agent notes

`html2md` is the repo's first **TWO-master** skill (CLAUDE.md §2). Proprietary,
All Rights Reserved (embeds proprietary docx/pdf code — see ../NOTICE).

## Cross-skill replication — DO NOT EDIT replicas here (`diff -q` gated)

- `web_clean/{archives,reader_mode,preprocess,dom_utils,normalize_css}.py`
  — MASTER = **pdf** (`skills/pdf/scripts/html2pdf_lib/`). The pdf
  `render.py` / `chrome_engine.py` / package `__init__.py` are the only
  weasyprint/playwright carriers and are **never** replicated.
- `html2md_core.js` — MASTER = **docx** (`docx2md.js` turndown core; lands 022-03).
- `_errors.py`, `_venv_bootstrap.py` — MASTER = **docx** (4→5-skill loop).

`web_clean/__init__.py` is **html2md-owned** (thin re-export of the clean public
symbols) and is NOT gated. A smoke-test (G-2) asserts `weasyprint`/`playwright`
stay out of `sys.modules` after importing `web_clean.archives` + `.reader_mode`.

## html2md-owned files

- `html2md.py` — shim: venv bootstrap (`reexec_into_venv`) + re-exports.
- `html2md/cli.py` — argparse surface (ARCH §5.1), path/URL resolution, exit-map,
  `_errors` envelope routing. `main`/`convert` wired in 022-05. **TASK 023:** new flags
  (`--engine …|remote`, `--no-remote`, `--remote-format`, `--target-selector`, `--search`,
  `--max-results`); `_validate_usage` (post-parse usage → `Usage`/exit 2); `_resolve_search_paths`;
  `_convert_one` (the single shared convert path — also the trust-markdown `content_kind=="markdown"`
  bypass) + `_convert_search` (per-result loop; search emits ONE note each).
- `html2md/acquire.py` — FC-1: input dispatch + fetch. Offline 022-02; URL 022-06.
  **TASK 023 = the resilient fetch ladder (all html2md-owned, NOT gated):**
  `_acquire_url` is a **tier ladder** (`_url_tiers`: auto local-first `lite→chrome→remote`;
  `jina`/`remote` remote-first + local fallback; `lite`/`chrome` single tier; `allow_chrome=False`
  drops chrome for attacker-influenceable search results). Tiers: `_tier_lite`/`_tier_chrome`/
  `_tier_remote`. Remote tier `_fetch_remote_html` = **vendor-agnostic** provider loop
  (`_remote_providers`/`_build_reader_request`; `jina` default, `HTML2MD_READER_URL`/`_PROVIDERS`
  for self-hosted). Classification: `_TierUnavailable` (escalate) vs terminal `FetchFailed`;
  one `FetchFailed(kind=all_engines_failed, details.tried=[…])` (URL-free trace) when exhausted.
  Privacy: target public-IP gate + `--no-remote` BEFORE any remote request; `_assert_safe_target`
  (CR/LF guard). Search: `_search_providers`/`run_search` (s.jina.ai default; per-result via the
  ladder). Trust-markdown: `_split_remote_markdown` + `_LOOKS_HTML` fallback.
  Heavy deps (httpx/trafilatura/playwright) imported lazily INSIDE functions only.
- `html2md/clean.py` — FC-2: calls `web_clean` (022-04). Never edits the replicas.
- `html2md_convert.js` — **html2md-owned** (NOT gated) turndown wrapper over the
  docx-mastered `html2md_core.js`; adds ARIA-role-table→GFM + chrome-button strip
  (web-page patterns docx doesn't have). The Node bridge spawns THIS file.
- `html2md/md_clean.py` — **html2md-owned** post-turndown Markdown tidy: merge empty
  ATX headings (GitBook/Mintlify/Fern split headings), drop standalone chrome lines
  (Copy / Search… / Ask AI / feedback / AI-widget), collapse blank runs.
- `html2md/core_bridge.py` — FC-3: spawns `node html2md_convert.js` (which require()s
  the gated `html2md_core.js`).
- `html2md/emit.py` — FC-4: frontmatter + `_attachments/` + dual-output (022-05). **TASK 023:**
  `_frontmatter` adds `engine:` (real tier, provenance/R6) + `query:` (`--search` results).
- `html2md/model.py` — the inter-stage IR (`AcquireResult`, `CleanResult`). **TASK 023:**
  `AcquireResult.content_kind` (`html`|`markdown`) + `markdown` (trust-mode payload).
- `html2md/exceptions.py` — `_AppError` hierarchy + exit codes. **TASK 023:** `Usage` (exit 2,
  post-parse usage errors).
